query:
INSERT INTO task_triggers (
                id,
                task_id,
                kind,
                time_limit_hours,
                cron
            )
            VALUES (?1, ?2, ?3, ?4, ?5)
            ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET
                task_id          = excluded.task_id,
                kind             = excluded.kind,
                time_limit_hours = excluded.time_limit_hours,
                cron             = excluded.cron
